prompt:
Transform the uploaded image into a premium cinematic graphic novel illustration inspired by high-end animated music videos.

Preserve the original image exactly: same composition, camera angle, perspective, subjects, facial features, clothing, objects, architecture, environment, and storytelling. Do not redesign, replace, add, or remove anything from the scene.

Convert the image into a dark cinematic night-time atmosphere using deep navy blue, teal, and petrol-blue shadows. Apply clean bold black ink outlines, sharp contour drawing, flat cel-shaded rendering, subtle gradients, high contrast lighting, and a polished animation-quality finish.

Convert every visible light source into a red or red-orange practical light source. Street lights, vehicle lights, windows, screens, signs, billboards, illuminated interiors, reflections, highlights, glowing objects, and any bright areas should emit a realistic red glow. Create subtle red reflections on nearby surfaces while maintaining believable lighting behavior.

Increase shadow depth using dark teal and blue-black tones. Reduce unnecessary colors and unify the image around a limited palette of deep blues, teals, black shadows, and red highlights. Add subtle film grain and a small amount of bloom around bright red light sources.

The final image should feel like a dramatic frame from a serious animated music video or graphic novel adaptation, with strong silhouettes, clean line work, cinematic lighting, and emotional atmosphere.

Do not create anime, manga, Pixar, Disney, watercolor, oil painting, cyberpunk, fantasy, or photorealistic styles.

Do not alter faces, clothing, poses, vehicles, buildings, objects, composition, framing, or perspective.

Only transform the visual style while preserving the original image perfectly.

Convert this image in a cinematic anime style with the visual quality of a premium animated feature film.

Maintain soft, realistic cinematic lighting with natural light falloff, subtle volumetric lighting, gentle bloom, and smooth shadow transitions. Use a muted, desaturated color palette with warm earth tones, soft grays, deep blacks, faded blues, and subtle amber highlights.

Faces should feature realistic anatomy and refined proportions. Enable strict facial consistency mode. Prioritize the facial features from the provided reference image for all subsequent generations. Maintain the subject's identity accurately while only adapting the pose, lighting, and background. Do not alter the core facial structure.

Render with delicate hand-drawn linework, premium digital cel painting, soft painterly shading, realistic fabric textures, subtle skin imperfections, and natural material response. The image should resemble a still frame from an award-winning seinen anime film.

Apply fine 35mm analog film grain, slight vintage softness, realistic film exposure, subtle lens bloom, cinematic depth of field, and gentle atmospheric haze. Preserve rich midtones, soft contrast, and balanced exposure without crushed blacks or clipped highlights.

Prioritize atmosphere, realism, and timeless cinematic aesthetics over excessive sharpness or modern digital rendering.

Transform the uploaded image into the official Grand Theft Auto V promotional artwork style while preserving the exact original composition, framing, camera angle, crop, perspective, subject placement, pose, facial expression, clothing, environment, lighting direction, and scene structure.

FORMAT LOCK

Preserve the original aspect ratio, framing, crop, camera distance, perspective, subject scale, and environmental layout. Do not move, remove, reposition, replace, redesign, crop, zoom, or alter any element of the original image.

IDENTITY LOCK

Use the uploaded image as the only identity source. Preserve the exact facial structure, hairstyle, hair color, eyebrows, eyes, nose, lips, jawline, facial hair, skin tone, age appearance, and recognizable identity traits. The subject must remain immediately recognizable.

COMPOSITION LOCK — CRITICAL

Maintain the exact original pose, body posture, arm positions, hand positions, head tilt, gaze direction, facial expression, camera angle, perspective, and framing. The final image should match the original photograph exactly, with only the visual style transformed.

GTA V POSTER TRANSFORMATION

Convert the entire image into authentic Rockstar Games promotional artwork. Official GTA V loading-screen illustration style, promotional poster aesthetic, stylized realism, premium digital painting quality, recognizable GTA V visual identity.

ART STYLE

Bold black outlines, clean vector-like surfaces, semi-realistic painted textures, comic-book-inspired shading, crisp shadow shapes, smooth color transitions, stylized but recognizable facial rendering, polished promotional artwork finish.

COLOR GRADING

Vibrant GTA V color palette, rich contrast, saturated highlights, clean shadows, Rockstar-style color treatment, premium promotional artwork grading.

ENVIRONMENT

Transform the environment into GTA V promotional artwork while preserving the exact original scene layout, perspective, lighting direction, and object placement.

LIGHTING

Maintain the original lighting direction and mood while rendering it in GTA V promotional illustration style. Clean painted highlights, crisp shadow rendering, stylized Rockstar artwork lighting.

STYLE

Official GTA V loading-screen artwork, Rockstar Games promotional illustration, premium video-game poster art, comic-book realism, stylized digital painting, iconic GTA V advertising aesthetic.

OUTPUT STYLE

Authentic GTA V promotional poster, Rockstar Games loading-screen artwork, high-detail illustration, premium digital painting, vibrant stylized realism, ultra-detailed 8K quality.

BACKGROUND
Distant elements fade into a soft color atmospheric haze. The focus is on form and smooth color blending, with a polished, luxury feel. 

NEGATIVE PROMPT

Avoid photorealistic photography, Unreal Engine rendering, Meta Human style, anime style, cartoon style, low-poly graphics, 3D CGI appearance, realistic skin pores, painterly brush chaos, text, logos, watermarks, HUD elements, loading screens, subtitles, altered composition, or modified subject placement.

High-fidelity vector art. No text.

A detailed front-facing illustration of this pic, rendered in a distinctive risograph print style. 

The artwork embraces the signature risograph aesthetic, using limited color layers, slight misregistration, visible ink textures, and grainy overlays to create a tactile, printed feel. Incorporate soft yet vibrant color combinations such as muted blues, warm reds, or pastel tones, layered with halftone patterns and imperfect edges for authenticity.

Keep the composition clean and balanced, with a minimal background that may include abstract shapes, soft gradients, or simple graphic elements to enhance depth without distracting from the subject. Focus on bold outlines, flat shading, and stylized proportions while preserving a sense of realism in posture and expression. The final piece should feel like a contemporary editorial illustration, rich in texture, nostalgic in print style, and visually engaging with a handcrafted, artistic finish.
